settings_language_desc: Interface language. Changing it reloads the app.
status_focused_app_hint: The daemon hasn't received any focus events yet. On KDE Plasma the focus bridge below must be loaded — use Repair if it isn't. On Sway / Hyprland it works out of the box via wlr-foreign-toplevel-management.
status_compat_known: ratbagd APIVersion={version} is within our supported range (expected {expected}). Should work; file a bug if you see anomalies.
status_compat_below_min: ratbagd APIVersion={version} is below the minimum gamerat has validated. gamerat may misbehave — consider upgrading libratbag.
status_compat_above_known: ratbagd APIVersion={version} is newer than the version gamerat was tested against ({expected}). This usually works, but the combination hasn't been explicitly validated — bugs may occur.
status_compat_unreachable_warning: ratbagd isn't running — gamerat-daemon can't apply profiles until it's started (systemctl start ratbagd).
status_softinput_hint: Software-input pipeline (uinput-backed toggles). Enable / disable from Settings; flips require a daemon restart.
status_softinput_popover_body: The daemon either can't open /dev/uinput or can't read your mouse's /dev/input/event* nodes — until that's fixed, pressing a soft-toggle button does nothing useful.
status_softinput_step_reboot: If a plain relogin doesn't pick the group up (KDE Plasma caches the gid set on its systemd --user manager), reboot — or run loginctl terminate-user $USER from a fresh TTY (Ctrl+Alt+F2).
status_softinput_step_status: Run gameratctl soft-input status for a per-piece breakdown.
status_bridge_hint: On KDE Plasma, gamerat observes window focus through the gamerat-focus KWin script. Auto-switching only works while it's loaded.
status_bridge_not_loaded_warning: The KWin focus script isn't loaded, so window auto-switching is inactive. Repair loads it now and enables it for future logins.
status_bridge_unknown_warning: Couldn't probe KWin. If auto-switching isn't working, try Repair.
